auth_notes: There is no public developer API for Basic Landline (basiclandline.com). Integration requires either reverse-engineering the dashboard's internal web API using session cookies/headers or utilizing an Email Trigger node to parse notifications.
rate_limits: Unknown; likely strictly monitored for non-browser traffic.
gotchas: Complete lack of official API documentation makes maintenance difficult
Account may be flagged if automated requests mimic bot behavior too closely
Functionality is limited to what is exposed in the consumer web portal
client_must_provide: Access to the email account associated with the service for notification parsing
research_notes: The HTTP Request approach will likely involve 'scraping' the internal JSON endpoints used by the Basic Landline web dashboard. A more stable production approach for n8n would be to enable 'SMS to Email' or 'Missed Call Email' within the Basic Landline settings and use the n8n Email Read node to trigger workflows.

effort_recommendation.rationale: The HTTP Request approach will likely involve 'scraping' the internal JSON endpoints used by the Basic Landline web dashboard. A more stable production approach for n8n would be to enable 'SMS to Email' or 'Missed Call Email' within the Basic Landline settings and use the n8n Email Read node to trigger workflows.
